text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Check out #mod-guidelines to get started. We're glad to have you on the team!
Welcome, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Head over to #events to see upcoming activities you can help with. Excited to have you!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You're in as a member. Feel free to introduce yourself and explore the channels. Let us know if you have any questions!
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Check out #mentorship to connect with mentees. Thanks for volunteering your expertise!
